examples: With the exception of department stores, the crisis has therefore confirmed one old truth: that families are best of all at shopkeeping.
With the exception of department stores (see article), the crisis has therefore confirmed one old truth: that families are best of all at shopkeeping.
For Booker, a 159-year-old British firm that started off as a sugar producer in South America, it meant anticipating the nationalisation of its core business and moving into shipping and shopkeeping.
